topic: Our family Christmas card from nineteen ninety eight has gained an extra child every December since
title: Our Family Christmas Card from 1998 Has Gained an Extra Child Every December Since | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Our family Christmas card from nineteen ninety eight has gained a child every December since.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a family photo album page showing a vintage Christmas studio portrait of three people in red sweaters, dim warm lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Plain studio shot. Three of us. Mom. Dad. Me at four years old.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a nineteen ninety eight Christmas card photograph with three figures, a studio backdrop visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Card lives in the family album. Hardcover. Plastic sleeves.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a hardcover photo album on a coffee table with plastic sleeve pages visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: December two thousand. Pulled the album out. Four of us in the picture.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the same Christmas card photograph now showing four figures, the fourth a small child, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Asked my mother. She said that was my brother.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a mother's hands holding the same family album page, only the hands visible, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I never had a brother. She has never said that before. Or since.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an empty hallway in a family home, framed photographs hanging on the wall, soft afternoon light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Checked next December. Five kids in the photo now.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of the Christmas card photograph showing five figures now, two children added, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every year an extra child appears in our nineteen ninety eight portrait.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of an album page with the same photograph showing six figures, the additions visibly progressive, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Mom recognizes each one. Names them. Cannot say where they went.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a mother seated in an armchair with the open family album on her lap, seen from behind, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This year there are twenty eight of us. The smallest is sitting on my lap.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a Christmas card photograph crowded with twenty eight figures, the smallest seated on the lap of an adult, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I am due to have my first child next month.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a pregnant woman's hands resting on her abdomen, no face visible, soft morning kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I have not opened the album in a year. I am afraid to.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a closed hardcover photo album on a shelf, a layer of dust visible on the cover, dim ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing
